instruction: Someone repainted the yellow highlight ring on the paper airplane icon muted yellow. Set it back to the original.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/paper-airplane.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 12 3.269 3.125A59.769 59.769 0 0 1 21.485 12 59.768 59.768 0 0 1 3.27 20.875L5.999 12Zm0 0h7.5"/></g>
  <circle id="halo" fill="#dac030" stroke="#fde047" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="56" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/paper-airplane.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 12 3.269 3.125A59.769 59.769 0 0 1 21.485 12 59.768 59.768 0 0 1 3.27 20.875L5.999 12Zm0 0h7.5"/></g>
  <circle id="halo" fill="none" stroke="#fde047" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="56" />
</svg>
